canonical_question: How do I plan technology budget — infrastructure, tools, licenses with cost benchmarks by company size?
aliases: What should my startup tech budget look like?
How much should a startup spend on cloud infrastructure and SaaS tools?
Technology cost per employee benchmarks for startups
Startup IT budget template with cost breakdown

temporal_validity.last_breaking_change: Cloud provider pricing restructured: AWS doubled inter-AZ data transfer fees and bumped cross-region costs 25-40% in late 2025; 73% of SaaS vendors raised prices in 2025 with average 14.2% increase

constraints: Cloud infrastructure costs can jump 5-10x between MVP and growth stage
Most founders underestimate engineering costs by 40-60% in year one
SaaS vendor prices rose 14.2% on average in 2025; budget 10-15% annual escalation
Cloud credit programs expire in 1-2 years — plan for post-credit cost cliff
Technology spend as percentage of revenue varies by stage: 15-25% for early-stage SaaS
SOC2 compliance can cost $50K-200K if unplanned

skip_this_unit_if.condition: User needs financial projections and runway modeling, not technology-specific budgeting
User needs cloud architecture decisions, not budget planning
User is an established enterprise planning IT budget, not a startup

inputs_needed.question: What stage is the startup?
options: seed (3-10 people, pre-revenue or early revenue)

depends_on.label: Overall financial model that frames technology budget

related_to.label: SaaS operating benchmarks for cost ratio validation
